The medicinal parts of Belvala lucens are primarily the inner bark and the roots, which contain mucilages that have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The inner bark, in particular, is often used to treat digestive issues and irritable bowel syndrome due to its ability to protect and soothe the mucous membranes of the digestive tract. The medicinal properties of Belvala lucens make it a popular herbal remedy for a variety of health issues.
